text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Is Air Groove seriously still talking with the teacher?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Look at my poor tail and ears… 
Even they're bored out of their minds!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? I don't think that much time 
has passed.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're just too patient, Prez! And why are you suddenly so free anyway? You're always busy!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I simply have no pressing matters that need 
my attention. I thought this would be a good 
time to stretch my legs, so to speak.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it's not often that I have time to chat 
with you, so I'd like it to last a while.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ehehe!♪ Well, if that's what you want, I suppose I can stick around a liiittle longer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So whatcha wanna talk about? 
The day we first met?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Whatever you please. I simply wish to hear 
you speak with joy in your voice.
